title: Tale of Chunhyang: Love and Justice
description: Korea's greatest love story: a nobleman's son loves a courtesan's daughter; she endures torture rather than submit to a corrupt magistrate.
introduction: Korea's greatest love story: a nobleman's son loves a courtesan's daughter; she endures torture rather than submit to a corrupt magistrate.

translation.original_text: 남원부 퇴기 월매의 딸 춘향이라 하는 처녀
translation.text: In Namwon, there was a maiden named Chunhyang, daughter of the retired kisaeng Wolmae.
